dismissalText.commentary: Sai Sudharsan c Iyer b Jansen 13 (11b 2x4 0x6 18m) SR: 118.18

dismissalComment.html: caught at mid-off, Jansen makes the breakthrough for PBKS. Sudharsan wanted to loft that over mid on I think, but the length was good and the line was on middle and it may have straightened a touch too, he ended up slicing it straight to Shreyas Iyer. The bat turned in his hand as he made contact with the shot.

dismissalText.commentary: Shubman Gill c Connolly b Chahal 39 (27b 6x4 0x6 48m) SR: 144.44

dismissalComment.html: Gill has not looked fluent against Chahal and he holes out in the deep! Chahal gave that ball air on middle stump, Gill got down on one knee and attempted the big slog sweep, he didn't hit it far enough and Connolly settled under the catch on the deep midwicket boundary

dismissalText.commentary: Jos Buttler c Bartlett b Chahal 38 (33b 3x4 2x6 62m) SR: 115.15

dismissalComment.html: caught on the long on boundary, Bartlett has timed his jump perfectly! Buttler stepped out of his crease to try and get under the ball and loft over the long-on boundary, he almost managed to succeed, but Bartlett positioned himself on the edge on the boundary and jumped up to take the catch over his head, Buttler can't quite believe it

dismissalText.commentary: Glenn Phillips c Jansen b Vyshak 25 (17b 1x4 1x6 21m) SR: 147.05

dismissalComment.html: Jansen again, and this time Vyshak has his man! Fuller length, straighter line, and Phillips mis-timed the lofted shot straight to long off. It looked like Vyshak ran his fingers down the side of the ball during his release to take a bit of pace off the ball

dismissalText.commentary: Washington Sundar c Arshdeep Singh b Vyshak 18 (16b 2x4 0x6 24m) SR: 112.5

dismissalComment.html: in the air and straight to Arshdeep at deep point! Two wickets for Vyshak. He dug it in short and took pace off the ball, Sundar waited , got under the ball and cut it in the air, simply did not get enough power on the shot
